title: php bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.0.30-4]
- Fix pgsql extension does not check for errors during escaping
  CVE-2025-1735
- Fix NULL Pointer Dereference in PHP SOAP Extension via Large XML Namespace Prefix
  CVE-2025-6491
- Fix Null byte termination in hostnames
  CVE-2025-1220
- Fix soap memory corruption
- Fix ldap_set_option() not applied on different ldap connections
full_text:
[8.0.30-4]
- Fix pgsql extension does not check for errors during escaping
  CVE-2025-1735
- Fix NULL Pointer Dereference in PHP SOAP Extension via Large XML Namespace Prefix
  CVE-2025-6491
- Fix Null byte termination in hostnames
  CVE-2025-1220
- Fix soap memory corruption
- Fix ldap_set_option() not applied on different ldap connections

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23310.html
